namespace Demo;

public partial class M
{
    public partial global::Demo.D Map(global::Demo.S s)
    {
        global::System.ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull(s);
        return new global::Demo.D
        {
            X = s.X,
            Y = s.Y,
        };
    }
}
